title: Update gitvalidation epoch to avoid a bad commit

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit a0ff5f0 has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon a0ff5f00327b5c3fe407cedf91f7ec77ec850a19 -->
Once this merges we need to start retrying the rest of our merges
Alright, we cannot homu this, as it would change the commit ID of the trivial commit I added to reset gitvalidation. Going to manually merge to see if that clears things.
